creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
The trace from Shawn looks very different to the one from Neel. These are two different bugs very likely.

Given that Neel can't reproduce this anymore due to switching panicing service to Linux, and bug is reported for 13.1 (we have 13.2 and 14 release already), and there is no core file to analyze, I'm planning to close this bug unless there are any objections.
